title: eurya glandulosa
intro: Eurya glandulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphylacaceae, commonly known as the "glandular spiny staminate fig" due to its unique appearance. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Eurya glandulosa is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
